hypothesis: Implementing advanced semantic job matching with company culture analysis, predictive success scoring, and contextual relevance weighting will improve the practical utility of job matches by 30% while maintaining current discrimination levels. This includes natural language understanding of job descriptions, company value extraction from job postings, and success probability prediction based on historical patterns.

expected_improvement.semantic_understanding: new metric - 85%+ job intent classification accuracy

experiment_plan.phase_1: Semantic job description analysis with NLP

target_improvements: Better understanding of job requirements beyond surface-level skills
Company culture matching for better fit assessment
Predictive scoring for application success likelihood
Contextual weighting for different job seeker priorities
